literature_anchor.closure_note: Hermes-3 documents AFN as the recommended neutral model, with multispecies diffusion retained as a legacy comparison mode.
literature_anchor.primary_code_paper: Dudson et al. 2024, Hermes-3 multi-component plasma simulations

metrics.name: afn_diffusion_finite_fraction
metrics.notes: AFN neutral parallel diffusivities should remain finite for the prepared D/T/He recycling state.

metrics.name: multispecies_diffusion_finite_fraction
metrics.notes: Multispecies neutral parallel diffusivities should remain finite on the same prepared state.

metrics.name: d_afn_to_multispecies_diffusion_contrast
metrics.notes: The d neutral should retain a measurable AFN-versus-multispecies diffusivity contrast on the prepared multispecies state.

metrics.name: t_afn_to_multispecies_diffusion_contrast
metrics.notes: The t neutral should retain a measurable AFN-versus-multispecies diffusivity contrast on the prepared multispecies state.

metrics.name: he_afn_to_multispecies_diffusion_contrast
metrics.notes: The he neutral should retain a measurable AFN-versus-multispecies diffusivity contrast on the prepared multispecies state.

metrics.name: deuterium_afn_charge_exchange_fraction
metrics.notes: Charge exchange should remain a non-negligible part of the AFN neutral collision budget for deuterium on this prepared state.
